symbols: knight in full armor on horseback — the Christian warrior armed for spiritual battle
lance — the weapon of the dragon-slayer, faith piercing evil
heraldic shield with cross — the cross of Christ as the knight's protection and identity
saint in the upper niche — heavenly patronage watching over the warrior below
castle in the background — the city of God or the Church defended by its champions
description: A medieval-style illustration depicting a knight in full plate and chain armor standing beside a dark horse, holding a long lance upright. The knight wears a helmet and carries a shield with a heraldic design. In the upper left corner, within a small architectural niche against a red background, a haloed saint figure is depicted holding a staff or cross. Behind the main knight, a medieval castle or church with pointed roofs and towers is visible. The lower border is decorated with small flowers.
